overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark, misty forest at night or during a storm. The character traverses a dirt path and crosses a shallow stream surrounded by tall pine trees and mountainous terrain in the background.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt forest path, swords visible on his back, moving through tall pine trees with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the path
Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the path
Large mountain peaks visible through the mist in the background
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
Tall dead tree trunk without leaves standing among the pines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, misty forest trail at night. Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense tall pine trees. Mountains loom in the foggy background while dead snags and undergrowth dot the landscape. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with low blue-green lighting.

events.description: ground transitions from dirt path to shallow water as Geralt enters a forest stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through a shallow stream, water splashing around his boots as he crosses the forest waterway

entered.detail: Shallow water stream with visible rocky bed and rippling surface reflecting the dim light
Stones and rocks visible beneath the clear shallow water
Grass-covered bank leading down to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions from the dry forest path into a shallow stream, wading through the water as it flows between grassy banks. The rocky stream bed is visible beneath the surface. Tall pines continue to line both sides while the mountains remain visible through the mist in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail continuing beyond the stream

events.description: exits the shallow water and returns to dry dirt forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the forest trail after crossing the stream, moving deeper into the wooded area

entered.detail: Thick underbrush and smaller trees filling the spaces between the tall pines

segments.scene_description: After crossing the stream, Geralt returns to dry ground and continues along the winding dirt path. The forest becomes denser with thick undergrowth filling the spaces between the towering pine trees. The path stretches ahead into the misty darkness with mountains still visible in the far background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, nocturnal forest that transitions from a dry trail through a shallow waterway and back into dense woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path under low blue-green lighting, surrounded by towering pine trees and distant, fog-shrouded mountains. As he moves forward, the terrain shifts as he wades from the dry path into a shallow stream, crossing a rocky bed between grassy banks while the misty mountains remain visible. The scene then opens back onto dry ground as Geralt returns to the winding dirt trail, where the forest grows denser with thick undergrowth filling the gaps between the pines. Finally, the camera follows him as the path stretches further into the atmospheric darkness and lingering mist of the mountainous wilderness.
